title: Interactive Timeline of Forensic Science History
description: Interactive Timeline of Forensic Science History
creator: Forensic Science Intelligent Textbook
subject: Forensic Science
History of Forensic Science
bloomLevel: Remember (L1) — identify and recall key milestones in forensic science history.
chapter_title: Foundations of Forensic Science and Legal Principles

learningObjectives: Identify and recall key milestones in the development of forensic science.
Place modern forensic techniques in their historical and legal context.

pedagogical.interactionPattern: Clickable chronological timeline with hover summaries and click-to-reveal infoboxes
pedagogical.assessment: Students build a Year/Milestone/Significance table and connect each milestone to its chapter
